HF1010

A bill for an act providing for an annual authorization fee to be collected by the college student aid commission from certain postsecondary educational institutions not subject to registration with the commission.(Formerly HF 772, HSB 48.)

Status: Passed One Chamber

Most Recent Action: Introduced, placed on Ways and Means calendar. H.J. 931.

Lobbyist Declarations: 0 For | 0 Against | 1 Undecided

Sponsors

House Ways and Means Committee

Related Legislation

This bill is part of a group of 3 related bills.

Bill Title Status
HF 772 A bill for an act providing for an annual authorization fee to be collected by the college student aid commission from certain postsecondary educational institutions not subject to registration with the commission.(Formerly HSB 48; See HF 1010.) Passed Committee
HSB 48 A bill for an act providing for an annual authorization fee to be collected by the college student aid commission from certain postsecondary educational institutions not subject to registration with the commission.(See HF 772, HF 1010.) Passed Committee
